headline: Adobe Taps Semrush Lovable AI Link As Search Data Joins App Design
summary: Semrush, an Adobe company, has launched an AI search intelligence partnership with Lovable. The collaboration lets Lovable users access Semrush’s search dataset natively inside Lovable’s AI-driven app building tools. The move reflects Adobe’s effort to link its assets to AI and SaaS platforms beyond its core creative software portfolio. For Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE), this tie up sits at the intersection of search data, AI tools, and software for developers and brands. Semrush’s dataset plugged...

headline: Price Prediction: Adobe Is Poised For A Strong Rebound
summary: Adobe (NASDAQ:ADBE) has had a brutal year, but our model sees a meaningful recovery ahead. The stock currently trades at $240.83, down 39.18% over the past year. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Adobe is $326.26, implying 35.47% upside over the next 12 months. Our model carries a 90% confidence level on the target. The ... Price Prediction: Adobe Is Poised For A Strong Rebound

headline: Jim Cramer Calls Figma an “Eclectic Design Distributor That’s Made Life Difficult for Adobe”
summary: Figma, Inc. (NYSE:FIG) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money as he discussed how semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are driving the market higher. Cramer discussed the stock ahead of the company’s earnings, as he remarked: Thursday, we’re going to get the latest from Figma. Okay, now this is an eclectic design distributor […]

headline: Semrush Announces Partnership With Lovable, Bringing Search Intelligence Into the Building Experience
summary: BOSTON, May 13, 2026--Semrush, an Adobe company and the leading brand visibility platform, today announces an industry-first partnership with Lovable, the AI software creation platform, integrating its expansive proprietary dataset directly into the Lovable building experience.
